A/repro: real Chromium on worktree vite (:5288 → live :8787). Focused .hud-help (document.activeElement confirmed), pressed Enter → legend:false, node-info popup opened instead (infoOverlay:true) — the capture-phase keydown resolves Enter as board.info and preventDefault cancels the button's native Enter→click activation. Mouse click on the same button opens the legend fine. Root cause predates tonight's icon/tooltip pass: 70d1fa44 (07-04) bound Enter to board.info with no focused-control guard; the tooltip commit only swapped title=→data-tip. Screenshot: tooltip shows focus on '?' while the WRONG surface (info popup) is open.

B/pass at ce9c2f38: same scenario, same real-Chromium loop (worktree vite :5288 → live :8787). Focused .hud-help, Enter → legend:true, infoOverlay:false — activation now equals click (Space verified too). Regression check: plain Enter with no control focused still opens the node-info popup and the route stays #/graph (enter-opens-info-not-session-board intact). Fix: capture handler passes Enter/Space through when DOM focus sits on a native control.
